title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Blackbeard, Unknown person #4 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grand Line - The ruins of the MUGGY Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at this!! Imu so happy that master Moria is alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why didn't you tell me, then, you idiot!? This information is important to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know how many meals I've prepared for you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've cooked more meals than you have.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but I helped you tend to your farm!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm leaving!! Good luck living on your own!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't suddenly start being so nice to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...leaving now is probably for the best, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An interest- ing topic was brought up at the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Call teach over here this instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Pizarre, that's Gecko Moria!! He's a former warlord!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why'd you guys let him pass through?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He forced his way inland!! He annillated the port!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Admiral teach and that invisible man named absalom, who arrived on this island a few days ago.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
